destinations.evidence: try_into_pooled accepts Scheduled and converts it into the pooled envelope instead of rejecting it.
destinations.snippet: match self { ... Self::Scheduled(tx) => Ok(tx.into()), Self::AsyncCommitment(tx) => Ok(tx.into()), ... }

destinations.evidence: PooledTransaction is an EthereumTxEnvelope with sidecar-capable EIP-4844 and therefore includes the Scheduled envelope variant.

equivalence_argument: Mapped in alloy dependency: signed Scheduled envelopes convert into pooled envelopes preserving the signed value.
rationale: The later neighbor directly reverses the primary candidate UnsupportedForP2P conversion rule and is therefore the effective current behavior for signed scheduled transaction conversion.
statement: At current tip, TryFrom<TransactionSigned> for PooledTransaction must accept a signed Transaction::Scheduled by producing PooledTransaction::Scheduled that preserves the scheduled transaction, signature, and hash, rather than rejecting it as UnsupportedForP2P.
suggested_falsification_tests: Construct a signed Scheduled envelope and call try_into_pooled; assert the result is the Scheduled pooled variant with matching hash/signature.
Assert UnsupportedForP2P is not returned for Scheduled.
summary: Signed scheduled transactions convert to pooled scheduled transactions in alloy.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Scheduled TransactionSigned try_into_pooled should return PooledTransaction::Scheduled.
title: Signed scheduled transactions convert to pooled scheduled transactions
